title: Project tracker
noAgent: Select an agent from the sidebar to manage its Linear connection.

linear.intro: Connect Linear to let your agent read issues, projects, and cycles, and respond to delegations through Linear's Agent Session protocol.

notConnected.title: Connect Linear
notConnected.body: Houston will open Linear in your browser. After you sign in and consent, your agent can read and write issues for your team.

connecting.title: Waiting for Linear
connecting.body: Finish signing in to Linear in your browser. This page will update automatically once you're connected.

issues.empty: No issues mirrored yet. Try Sync now.
issues.openFailed: Couldn't open the link in your browser.

tab.title: Linear board
tab.notConnectedTitle: Linear is not connected for this agent
tab.notConnectedBody: Connect Linear in Settings to mirror your team's issues, projects, and cycles into Houston.
tab.zeroIssuesBody: Your Linear org is connected, but nothing has been mirrored yet. Try a fresh sync.

connections.intro: Every Linear org connected to this workspace. Each is mirrored under the workspace and shared by the agents inside.
connections.disconnectConfirmBody: This removes the Linear OAuth tokens and the workspace-level connection metadata. The mirrored data on disk is left in place for now; remove the workspace's tracker folder manually if you want it gone.
